docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BARBONI, RICHARD TURPIN, ROLLIE AS TO DEFENDANT BEZANSON, CYNTHIA RAELENE DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED

MEMO TO SET AND NOTICE OF COURT TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF BARBONI, RICHARD TURPIN, ROLLIE COURT TRIAL SET FOR JAN-29-1998 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 220 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED

RM220/#1 JUDGE:DONNA LITTLE;DIANA PADILLA/CSR;GVANHEST/CLERK C/C FOR COURT TRIAL. COUNSEL RICHARD ALEXANDER PRESENT ON BEHALF OF THE PLTF AND WITH RESIDENT MANAGER MILANA TRILESSKAYA, DEFT PRESENT IN PRO PER. STIPULATION FOR JUDGMENT READ INTO THE RECORD.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BEZANSON, CYNTHIA RAELENE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 225 HYDE ST. #610, S.F., STAYED UNTIL FEB-10-1998, LEASE FORFEITED, 5PM. IF DEFT VACATES AND RETURN KEYS BEFORE 5PM 2/10/98 TO MANAGER, THEN WRIT WILL BE RECALLED, JUDGMENT VACATED AND CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE.
